positive: A retro synthwave geometric illustration featuring a stylized palm tree silhouetted against a magenta and cyan gradient sunset. Include neon grid lines receding into the distance and a floating chrome sphere. Vector art style, reminiscent of 1980s vaporwave album covers. Clean, bold lines, and high contrast.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
